free_text: Mass energy characteristics of the reactions
The targets were 180-220-mug/cm**2 layers of Pb-208
evaporated onto a 50 mug/cm**2 carbon backing and
125-mug/cm**2 layers of Cm-248 evaporated onto a
20 mug/cm**2 aluminum  backing and covered by carbon
The fision fragments were registered by the
a method of kinematic coincidences. Each arm of the
spectrometer consisted of a Start micro-channel
8-neutron detectors from DEMON for detection of neutron
and 4 NaI(Tl) scintillation detectors for prompt gamma
.The uncertainty is reported by authors on
